reason: The remediation only edits /etc/postfix/main.cf to set smtpd_client_restrictions, a standard Postfix hardening step. It does not affect system authentication, boot process, or critical kernel parameters, and the change can be rolled back easily if mail service issues arise.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; filesystems affected; Potential mail service disruption if Postfix fails to restart; Incorrect syntax could prevent mail delivery
